textarea-field._comment: TextareaField component tokens — Lot 3.2B. Extends TextField with auto-grow, manual resize grip, and row-height management.

border-color.$description: Replaces legacy `#ddd` fallback (Lot 3.1). `{color.border.subtle}` resolves to neutral.300 in light and its dark-theme counterpart.

opacity.$description: Grip resting opacity (was hardcoded 0.2 — aligned to nearest palette step opacity.26 pending opacity.20 decision from Lot 2D arbitrage).
